overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character riding a white horse through the historic city of Saint Denis. The camera follows the rider through muddy cobblestone streets, narrow alleys, and past streetcars and horse-drawn carriages in a sunny, dusty atmosphere with strong period architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with wrought iron balconies

events.description: turns right from starting position onto the main cobblestone street
rider on white horse passes by in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: riding a white horse through muddy cobblestone streets, passing pedestrians on wooden sidewalks and turning onto the main road

notable_agents.action: rider on white horse galloping past in the opposite direction

entered.detail: weathered wooden building with wrought iron balcony and potted plants
blue painted brick building with GROCERY signage on the facade
raised wooden plank walkway running along the building front
tall wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a historic two-story building with wrought iron balconies. The rider turns right onto a muddy cobblestone street lined with wooden sidewalks. Pedestrians stand near the buildings, and another rider gallops past in the opposite direction. The blue Grocery building dominates the right side of the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between brick buildings

events.description: turns left into a narrow alleyway between tall brick buildings
exits the narrow alley back onto the main street with tram tracks

agents.ego_description: guiding the horse through a tight alleyway between weathered brick walls, navigating around an abandoned cart

entered.detail: tight passage between weathered brick walls with debris on the ground
empty wooden wagon with broken sides blocking part of the path

segments.scene_description: The rider turns into a narrow, shadowed alley between tall brick buildings. The space is tight, with an abandoned wooden cart on the right. The alley opens up ahead to a brighter street. No pedestrians are visible in this service passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street with tram tracks and horse traffic

events.description: exits the alley onto the main street where a tram is visible ahead
passes a horse-drawn carriage moving in the same direction on the right

agents.ego_description: following a streetcar along tram tracks, navigating around other horse-drawn vehicles and riders in moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: green streetcar moving slowly along the tracks ahead
horse-drawn carriage with driver in red shirt moving parallel to the rider

entered.detail: green electric streetcar with CITY lettering on the side
metal rails embedded in the muddy cobblestone street
red painted storefront sign reading JELLIES PRESERVES PICKLES

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the scene opens onto a busy commercial street with tram tracks running down the center. A green streetcar moves ahead in the distance, while pedestrians walk along the wooden sidewalks. The rider passes a horse-drawn carriage on the right and continues following the tram through the historic district.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic warehouse district with painted advertisements

events.description: turns right at an intersection, leaving the tram tracks behind
passes the large Schiffer Beer warehouse building with painted advertisement

agents.ego_description: turning through intersections and continuing down muddy streets, passing the Schiffer Beer building and following other riders through a dusty atmosphere

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving ahead on the tracks through dusty air

entered.detail: dark brick warehouse with large painted Schiffer Beer advertisement on the wall
weathered white plaster building with green shutters and arched windows
faded painted sign reading SOUP KITCHEN on brick wall

segments.scene_description: The rider turns right at an intersection, leaving the tram behind and entering a warehouse district. The camera passes the prominent Schiffer Beer building with its large painted advertisement, then continues through dusty, sunlit streets lined with weathered commercial buildings and other horse-drawn traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the historic city of Saint Denis, transitioning from residential cobblestone streets through a secluded alleyway and into a bustling commercial and warehouse district. It begins by following a rider past wrought iron balconies and a blue grocery building on a muddy street where pedestrians gather and other riders pass by. As the rider turns away from the main road, the scene shifts into a narrow, shadowed alley flanked by tall brick buildings and an abandoned wooden cart before emerging back into the light. The environment then opens onto a busy thoroughfare featuring tram tracks and a distant green streetcar, with the camera gliding past horse-drawn carriages and pedestrians on wooden sidewalks. Finally, the rider turns at an intersection to leave the trams behind, moving through a sunlit warehouse district past the prominent Schiffer Beer building and weathered commercial facades.
